roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PRETRIAL & ACM ELIG RPT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OFRELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO PARTICIPATE IN SERVICES AT HOSPITALITY HOUSE AND REPORTTO ACM FIVE TIMES A WEEK/ /LD:03-28-22/CONTD:PRETRIAL/DOP/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN - FTA ARRAIGNMENT/BWDNC/SHER/BAIL:50,000/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 03-28-22/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND TRIAL/DOP/

/CAL:CUSTODY STATUS/NP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCHWARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X:  NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO 12-07-21/X: BAIL SET AT $50,000/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:12-20-21/ACM//SAORD/SA2:3845 MARKET ST, SAN FRANCISCO/SAORD3/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOPU:POSITIVE REPORT/
